message:
refactor(benches): migrate benchmarks from tokio to CompatRuntime

Replace direct tokio::runtime::Runtime and tokio::runtime::Builder
usage with the frankenterm CompatRuntime abstraction (Runtime,
RuntimeBuilder) in both native_events_latency and pool_benchmark
suites.

Switch from criterion's b.to_async(&rt) pattern to b.iter(|| {
rt.block_on(async { ... }) }) to work correctly with the compat
runtime layer, which may not implement criterion's AsyncExecutor
trait. This keeps benchmarks portable across runtime backends.

- native_events_latency: migrate runtime(), all 4 benchmark functions
- pool_benchmark: migrate make_runtime(), all 5 benchmark functions
- Import CompatRuntime, Runtime, RuntimeBuilder from runtime_compat

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
